message: Node started: Maximize the objective function Z = (sum_{i=1}^{9} sum_{j=1}^{9} B_{i,j}) mod 998244353, where B is a 9 x 9 board. The board is modified by selecting a set S of up to K=81 placements of 3 x 3 stamps. Each stamp placement covers a 3 x 3 subgrid. Note: The problem description implies that placing a stamp modifies the board entries. Assuming standard 'stamp' mechanics where a stamp adds a specific value or pattern to the covered cells, let Ps be the set of cells covered by stamp s in S. The final value of cell (i,j) is B_{i,j} = Initial_{i,j} + sum_{s in S, (i,j) in Ps} StampValue_{s,i,j}. Input Data: Board dimensions: 9 x 9, Stamp dimensions: 3 x 3, Maximum number of stamps K = 81, Modulo: 998244353. Objective: Find the set of stamp placements S with |S| <= 81 that maximizes the sum of all board entries modulo 998244353.
